name: Public Joint Stock Company Kuzbasskaya Toplivnaya Company
summary: Public Joint Stock Company 'Kuzbasskaya Toplivnaya Company', together with its subsidiaries, engages in the extraction and production of thermal coal. The company operates through four segments: Domestic Sales of Produced Coal, Export Sales of Produced Coal, Resale of Purchased Coal, and Other Operations. It operates open-pit mines located in the territory of the Kemerovo region in Russia. The company is also involved in the wholesale supply of coal in Russia and internationally. In addition, it engages in the retail sale of coal to households, and municipal and commercial boilers through its distribution networks located in the Kemerovo, Omsk, Novosibirsk, and Altai regions, as well as in Poland. Further, the company is involved in the resale of coal purchased from other coal producers; generation of electricity, heat power, and hot water; provision of storage and railroad transportation services; and lease of land. It has operations in Russia, the European Union, and Asia. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Kemerovo, Russia. As of February 27, 2020, Public Joint Stock Company 'Kuzbasskaya Toplivnaya Company' operates as a subsidiary of Kilton Overseas Limited.
